26.reason: Error: This allocation creates a dummy node with uninitialized garbage values, causing an extra term in the result list. It should be initialized to NULL instead.

54.reason: This condition is unreachable because the loop condition r != NULL ensures r is never NULL inside the loop; the intended insertion at the end should be placed after the loop.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  This condition is unreachable because the loop condition r != NULL ensures r is never NULL inside the loop; the intended insertion at the end should be placed after the loop.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  This condition is unreachable because the loop condition r != NULL ensures r is never NULL inside the loop; the intended insertion at the end is not handled correctly.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: This check `if(r == NULL)` is inside the loop condition `r != NULL`, so it will never be true. The insertion at the end of the list fails when the new term has the smallest exponent.]
